caption: A man wearing a white shirt speaks into several microphones, gesturing with his hands as he addresses a crowd. Other men, including one in a white shirt and another in a dark vest, stand behind and beside him in an outdoor setting with trees in the background. The scene is framed by a news broadcast overlay from "NEWS 18 इंडिया". A red banner at the top reads "कांग्रेस चटपटई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", and a blue banner at the bottom states "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". Small profile photos with names like "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "संतोष सुमन", "सुमित कुमार", "डिप्टी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", and "विजय सिन्हा" appear on the sides of the screen. A clock in the bottom right corner reads "10:02 PM" next to a "MAHARASHTRA" logo. Across the frames, the speaker's expression and hand gestures shift slightly as he continues talking.
